shared_properties: The HUD uses the same project palette and art deco gold trim while preserving maximum contrast over dark and bright gameplay states.
All authored panels assume transparent-background UI composition above the world and beam layers.
Every module leaves deterministic safe zones for runtime text and fill masks to satisfy output contract stability.
differences: This asset packages five gameplay readouts in one atlas because they always appear together during active puzzle play.
The scale callout plates are designed to float near the world axle while still using UI-space art.
Exposure, Echo, and timer treatments deliberately use different accent colors to reduce misreads under pressure.

reference_images.label: gdd_markdown
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the shadow survival loop, mirror and prism puzzle rules, scale targets, HUD placements, and Bevy runtime constraints for Umbra Scale.

reference_images.label: moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the twilight art deco tower mood, silhouette contrast, gold trims, and hard-edge lighting style.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load exposure_balance_hud.png during Loading, build a 3x2 atlas for HP, exposure, floor/time, weight-angle, and echo counter modules, and bind task_id-based handles into the HUD setup system.
runtime_notes: Place all authored panel art in UI space rather than world space so the HUD ignores camera pan and zoom.
Leave clear mask zones for runtime-filled exposure bars, HP depletion, timer text, and weight-angle text overlays.
Keep the top-left and top-center modules separated enough that long timer strings do not overlap the HP or exposure bar art.

context.usage: Shows HP, exposure, floor, timer, live scale weights and angle, plus remaining Echo count during gameplay.

layout_notes: Reserve a 160x12 px horizontal exposure fill zone below the HP hearts in the top-left module.
Reserve a centered 240x48 px text-safe zone for FLOOR XX / 30 and MM:SS.ss in the top-center module.
Reserve a dynamic text-safe zone above and below the scale axle callout panel for L and R weights plus angle text.
Reserve two 20x30 px echo slots in the top-right module with 8 px spacing.

acceptance_criteria: Atlas canvas is exactly 960x240 px for six 320x120 modules with no frame gutter.
The exposure bar leaves a clean 160x12 px mask zone and the HP hearts remain readable at 75% preview scale.
No authored ornament intrudes into the text-safe zones reserved for floor, timer, weight, or angle strings.
